pred: The ground truth for fake news is established through manual inspection of the text field of tweets by a single person, who labels them as containing fake news or not.
answers: Ground truth is not established in the paper

pred: An extension of the NetVLAD approach, where ghost clusters are added to map noisy or irrelevant content into ghost clusters, which are not included during feature aggregation.
answers: extension of the NetVLAD, adds Ghost clusters along with the NetVLAD clusters
An extension of NetVLAD which replaces hard assignment-based clustering with soft assignment-based clustering with the additon o fusing Ghost clusters to deal with noisy content.
the attention model, MDREA, also outperforms the best existing research results (WAP 0.690 to 0.688)

pred: Context tweets are used as an additional feature, and character-level representations are used as another feature.
answers: using tweets that one has replied or quoted to as contextual information

pred: The proposed approach (GM_KL) performs better than other approaches (w2g and w2gm) on benchmark word similarity and entailment datasets.
answers: GM$\_$KL achieves better correlation than existing approaches for various metrics on SCWS dataset.

pred: The ensemble method works by selecting models based on their validation performance and adding them to the ensemble if they improve its performance, until a maximum of 10 models is reached.
answers: simply averaging the predictions from the constituent single models
